name: railfinder-monorepo
description: RailFinder — monorepo root. Runs Express API + Vite frontend together.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names " API , UI " --prefix-colors "bgCyan.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
